events.description: Six parallel Explore-agent audits covered combat / economy / multiplayer-commands-input / tech-research-sect-training / crystal-curse-construction / world-terrain-fog-influence-UI. Yielded 30 confirmed missing-brace/missing-else bugs across 11 files plus ~30 other findings. Companion to task-050 (which covered AI/movement/spawn-presentation). Top-level recommendation: a single sweep PR for the missing-brace bugs plus EditorConfig csharp_prefer_braces rule to prevent recurrence.

Three findings flagged [unverified]: missing Ability case in LockstepManager.ExecuteCommand, Time.deltaTime tick accumulation in lockstep, missing SetTechFlag call on sect-tech completion. All claimed Critical by their respective agents. Must be verified by reading the live files before being acted on — agents had ~15% false-positive rate this audit (4 FPs documented in task body).
